title: CT2.N10 completed discharge record — C2 — replacement contradicts minimality
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT2.N10, the certificate node “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality” of tactic CT2 (Minimality and replacement). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT2.N10. It must be exactly `CT2`, selecting Minimality and replacement (minimality) as the tactic that owns the certificate step “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”. It must be exactly `CT2.N10` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT2.N10 within tactic CT2 (Minimality and replacement). It must be exactly 10, matching the N10 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT2.N10. It must be exactly `validated`, meaning that the node's certificate, trigger, or other validation obligation has been checked for the certificate obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT2.N10. The array must contain `A-Cert`, `S-Equiv`, `S-Pers`, `S-Meas`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `A-Cert` to occur in CT2.N10's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records for the obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”.

Requires `S-Equiv` to occur in CT2.N10's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that proves the required two-way response equivalence in every declared context for the obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”.

Requires `S-Pers` to occur in CT2.N10's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that proves that the named assertion persists across the recorded state transition for the obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”.

Requires `S-Meas` to occur in CT2.N10's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records a branch-state measure in a well-founded codomain and proves strict decrease for the obligation “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT2.N10 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: A-Cert (certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence); S-Equiv (left, right, contextClass, responseCriterion, evidence); S-Pers (fromStateRef, toStateRef, preserved, evidence); S-Meas (measure, sourceData, wellFoundedCodomain, strictDecrease, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `A-Cert` evidence instance at CT2.N10. It must be exactly `A-Cert`, identifying the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records; the same instance must supply certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Equiv` evidence instance at CT2.N10. It must be exactly `S-Equiv`, identifying the contract that proves the required two-way response equivalence in every declared context; the same instance must supply left, right, contextClass, responseCriterion, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Pers` evidence instance at CT2.N10. It must be exactly `S-Pers`, identifying the contract that proves that the named assertion persists across the recorded state transition; the same instance must supply fromStateRef, toStateRef, preserved, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Meas` evidence instance at CT2.N10. It must be exactly `S-Meas`, identifying the contract that records a branch-state measure in a well-founded codomain and proves strict decrease; the same instance must supply measure, sourceData, wellFoundedCodomain, strictDecrease, evidence.

certificate.description: Terminal certificate emitted when CT2.N10 closes its branch. It must be exactly `C2`, the framework's certificate for minimality or valid-replacement closure; the node's `A-Cert` instance and companion contracts must validate “C2 — replacement contradicts minimality”.

statement.informal: Validate or verify: C2 — replacement contradicts minimality

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
